question_title: Which party will win the Quebec provincial by-election in Chicoutimi scheduled for February 23, 2026?
summary: The Parti Québécois is the overwhelming favorite to win the Chicoutimi by-election on February 23, 2026. Key evidence: (1) 338Canada projects PQ at 47% vote share with >99% win probability, rating the seat "Safe PQ"; (2) PQ has won all 3 recent Quebec by-elections (Jean-Talon 2023, Terrebonne 2025, Arthabaska 2025), each time flipping CAQ seats; (3) Chicoutimi was a PQ stronghold before the 2018 CAQ wave, which has now fully reversed; (4) CAQ provincial support has collapsed from 41% in 2022 to ~15%, and the party is in disarray with Legault having resigned; (5) PQ candidate Marie-Karlynn Laflamme (UQAC VP) has a strong local profile. I discount slightly from 338's >99% to account for by-election volatility, giving PQ ~82%. The Conservative Party of Quebec shows some regional strength (projected ~19% in riding) but is very unlikely to win. CAQ, PLQ, and QS have negligible chances.

factors.description: 338Canada projects PQ at 47% ± 8% vote share in Chicoutimi with >99% win probability, rated 'Safe PQ'
PQ has won all 3 recent Quebec by-elections (Jean-Talon 2023, Terrebonne Mar 2025, Arthabaska Aug 2025), each flipping CAQ-held seats
Chicoutimi was a PQ stronghold before 2018; the CAQ wave has fully reversed with provincial support at ~15% vs 41% in 2022
CAQ in complete disarray - Legault resigned as leader, leadership election underway, party projected to win 0 seats provincially
Montreal Gazette describes PQ as 'heavy favourite'; all media coverage treats PQ win as near-certain
By-elections can produce surprises with low turnout and strong local candidates, providing some residual uncertainty
Conservative Party of Quebec projected 2nd at ~19% in riding - some regional strength but very unlikely to win

reasoning:
I'm getting a strong picture. Let me now fetch the Wikipedia article for more details, and look for recent polling data.Now let me look for riding-specific projections and check the qc125/338Canada projections for Chicoutimi.Excellent. I now have very strong data. Let me save my findings and write the meta-reflection.Now let me produce the final forecast.## Forecast: Chicoutimi By-Election (Feb 23, 2026)

**PQ is the overwhelming favorite** at ~82% probability.

### Key Evidence

| Factor | Direction |
|--------|-----------|
| 338Canada: PQ at 47% vote share, >99% model win probability, "Safe PQ" | Very strong PQ |
| PQ won all 3 recent by-elections (Jean-Talon, Terrebonne, Arthabaska) | Strong PQ |
| Chicoutimi was PQ stronghold before 2018; CAQ wave fully reversed | Strong PQ |
| CAQ collapsed to ~15% provincially; Legault resigned, party in disarray | Moderate PQ |
| All media describe PQ as "heavy favourite" | Moderate PQ |
| By-election volatility provides some residual uncertainty | Mild against certainty |

### Probability Distribution

| Party | Probability |
|-------|------------|
| **Parti Québécois (PQ)** | **82%** |
| CAQ | 6% |
| Conservative Party of Quebec | 5% |
| Quebec Liberal Party (PLQ) | 4% |
| Québec solidaire (QS) | 2% |
| Other | 1% |

I discounted from 338Canada's >99% model probability because by-elections can produce surprises that riding-level models don't fully capture, and I want to leave meaningful probability mass on upset scenarios. The CPQ has some regional strength (projected ~19% vote share) but converting that to a win remains very unlikely.

resolution_reason: The 2026 Chicoutimi by-election was held on February 23, 2026 as scheduled. Marie-Karlynn Laflamme of the Parti Québécois won the election, as confirmed by Wikipedia and multiple credible news sources including CBC News, Le Devoir, La Presse, Radio-Canada, and Le Quotidien. This was the PQ's 4th consecutive by-election victory.
resolution_criteria: This question resolves to the party of the candidate officially reported as elected in the [2026 Chicoutimi provincial by-election](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Chicoutimi_provincial_by-election). Use Élections Québec’s by-election results page as the primary source: https://www.electionsquebec.qc.ca/en/results-and-statistics/provincial-by-election-live-results/ The question may also resolve based on  [credible sources](https://www.metaculus.com/faq/#definitions).
fine_print: Options: (A) CAQ, (B) Parti Québécois (PQ), (C) Quebec Liberal Party (PLQ), (D) Québec solidaire (QS), (E) Conservative Party of Quebec, (F) Other. if the election is postponed past May 1, 2026 or no winner is declared by then, resolve “Other”.
